12.1_acoustic_geometry.nodal_lines: Sand migrates to stillness; thin pale particles outlining silent ridges on vibrating plate
12.1_acoustic_geometry.faraday_waves: Vertically shaken liquid tessellation, honeycomb ripples, phase-locked crests
12.1_acoustic_geometry.sonoluminescent_flash: UV pulse in dark liquid, single-pixel core with halo

12.2_olfactory_visualization.turbulent_odor_plume: Bursty ribbon flow, intermittent packets, curling filaments
12.2_olfactory_visualization.scent_fractal: Recursive odor topology, branching vapor trees, self-similar curls
12.2_olfactory_visualization.olfactory_cathedral: Misty vaulted hall, incense hues in columns, shafts through vapor mosaics

12.3_haptic_interfaces.pinfield_brain_sculpture: EEG topology, thousands of pins forming hills/valleys per attention state
12.3_haptic_interfaces.haptic_fog_interface: Invisible pressure veil, thin air pulse curtains, volumetric light catching mist
12.3_haptic_interfaces.tactile_aurora: Touchable light ribbons, electroluminescent filaments swaying like silk

12.4_chromesthetic_systems.fft_driven_particles: Low bins swell forms, mids seed textures, highs sparkle noise
12.4_chromesthetic_systems.frequency_bloom: Spectral flora, petals of amplitude, stems of harmonics
